name: Uptown Shrimp Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Sherry wine vinegar or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
2. Peel and devein the shrimp, set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine vinegar and next 3 ingredients (sugar, orange rind, and garlic). Gradually add olive oil, beating well with a wire whisk. Set aside.
4. Peel oranges and cut into 1/2-inch round slices. Add orange slices to the dressing; stir gently. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour.
5. To serve, add lettuce and green onions to shrimp mixture; toss gently.
